headline: What Makes KLA Corporation (KLAC) an Attractive Bet?
summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners, an investment management company, published its Q4 2025 investor letter for the “US Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the S&P 500 Total Return Index in the quarter in terms of returns, but outperformed in dividend growth. Despite debate over capital cycle returns, AI […]

headline: 3 Semiconductor Stocks to Buy After the Selloff — Bank of America’s Picks
summary: Bank of America says the sharp July selloff in Applied Materials, Lam Research and KLA is a buying opportunity as chip equipment spending accelerates.

headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Wednesday's pre-market session.
